revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-060

Alternative tems: Floor, Story (USA)

The space between two successive floors of a building.


Note: The French term etage does not apply to the space between the ground floor and the first floor.

{{IALAFooter}}
